description:
Product information

How to use: electric milk froth machine
Heating speed: 60-80 seconds
Is there a heat preservation function: None
Is there an appointment function: None
Function: milk frothing, heating milk
Heating and stirring
Large capacity of 250 ml milk
Small volume of milk is 100 ml
Back to make milk froth
The milk capacity is 150 ml
Product parameter
Operation mode: touch mode
Rated power: 500W
Rated voltage: 220V
Gross weight/net weight: 1kg/0.91kg
Milk tank capacity: 100-250ML
